# Lifestyle Medicine Gateway — LLMs.txt

> Lifestyle Medicine Gateway is a wellness marketplace and health resource platform based in Australia. It connects consumers with trusted vendors offering wellness products, professional health services, educational articles, healthy recipes, natural remedies, and scientific studies.

## About
Lifestyle Medicine Gateway is an online marketplace dedicated to lifestyle medicine — a branch of evidence-based healthcare focused on helping people adopt and sustain healthy behaviors. The platform bridges the gap between wellness product vendors, health practitioners, and consumers seeking a healthier lifestyle.

## Content Types

### Products
Wellness and health products including supplements, organic foods, equipment, skincare, and more from verified vendors.
URL pattern: /products and /products/{slug}

### Services
Professional wellness services such as coaching, consultations, yoga, reiki, and holistic health sessions bookable through the platform.
URL pattern: /services

### Articles
Evidence-based health and wellness articles written by qualified contributors covering nutrition, mental health, fitness, and preventive care.
URL pattern: /articles and /articles/{slug}

### Recipes
Healthy recipes focused on whole foods, plant-based nutrition, and dietary wellness aligned with lifestyle medicine principles.
URL pattern: /recipes and /recipes/{slug}

### Natural Remedies
Traditional and evidence-informed natural remedy guides for common health concerns.
URL pattern: /natural-remedies

### Scientific Studies
Curated summaries and references to peer-reviewed research in lifestyle medicine, nutrition science, and preventive healthcare.
URL pattern: /studies

### Videos
Educational wellness videos from health practitioners and vendors on topics including nutrition, exercise, mindfulness, and product demonstrations.
URL pattern: /videos

### Vendors
Approved wellness brands and health practitioners with their own storefronts on the marketplace.
URL pattern: /vendors and /vendors/{slug}

## Key Pages
- Homepage: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/
- Products: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/products
- Services: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/services
- Articles: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/articles
- Recipes: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/recipes
- Vendors: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/vendors
- About: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/about
- Contact: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/contact
- FAQ: https://www.lifestylemedicinegateway.com/faq
